Interface IUniqueValues

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that controls unique values.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B2768AB2-E583-4CCF-831D-36237C2F520A")]
public interface IUniqueValues
